title: disa hircicornis
intro: Disa hircicornis is a species of orchid native to South Africa, commonly known as the "horned iris" due to its distinctive horn-shaped growths. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Disa hircicornis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Disa hircicornis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
